file_insights: Created lib/features/offline/domain/services/sync_manager.dart (243 lines): Abstract interface defining SyncState, SyncPhase, SyncResult, and SyncStatus data classes with comprehensive sync orchestration API

Created lib/features/offline/infrastructure/sync/sync_manager_impl.dart (582 lines): Concrete implementation with full sync lifecycle management, four-phase sync process (Upload → Download → Conflict Resolution → Finalization), and comprehensive status reporting
Updated lib/app/di/modules/offline_module.dart: Added singleton registration for SyncManagerImpl
Updated lib/features/offline/domain/services/offline_services.dart: Exported SyncManager through barrel file
Updated lib/features/offline/infrastructure/sync/offline_sync.dart: Exported SyncManagerImpl through barrel file
Updated build progress tracking files with subtask 5.1 completion
Updated implementation plan with detailed notes and completion status
patterns_discovered: Clean architecture pattern separating domain interface from infrastructure implementation
Singleton pattern for sync manager instance management
State machine pattern using enums for sync state and phase tracking
Stream-based reactive programming for real-time status updates
Four-phase sync orchestration pattern (Upload → Download → Conflict Resolution → Finalization)
Connectivity-aware sync triggering with cooldown mechanism
Concurrent operation prevention with sync state management
Factory constructor pattern for result objects
Auto-sync pause/resume functionality for special scenarios
WiFi-only sync option with configurable behavior
gotchas_discovered: Need proper connectivity checking before sync triggering
Concurrent sync prevention requires careful state management
Auto-sync cooldown mechanism prevents sync spamming
WiFi-only sync option needs network type detection
Stream controllers must be properly disposed to prevent memory leaks
Four-phase sync process requires proper error handling and phase transition logic
Status updates must be thread-safe for concurrent listeners
Integration with existing DI container requires proper singleton registration

approach_outcome.approach_used: Implemented comprehensive sync manager following clean architecture principles, creating abstract domain interface and concrete infrastructure implementation with full sync lifecycle management, connectivity integration, and status reporting
approach_outcome.why_it_worked: Followed established project patterns from previous implementations, created modular design supporting both immediate and background sync operations, implemented comprehensive acceptance criteria coverage, maintained consistency with existing codebase architecture, and provided extensive documentation

recommendations: Add sync operation priority system for background sync scenarios
Implement sync metrics and analytics for performance monitoring
Add sync history tracking for debugging and audit purposes
Consider implementing sync cancellation mechanism for long-running sync operations
Add sync conflict detection and resolution strategy planning
Implement sync operation batching for performance optimization
Add comprehensive unit testing for sync manager scenarios
Consider implementing sync retry logic for failed operations
Add sync progress indicators for user feedback
Implement sync state persistence for app restart scenarios
